description: Unique identifier for this regional readiness assessment
Current stage in Protocolo C assessment
Description of strongest/most complete evidence available now
example: Defesa Civil records 2021, Sentinel-2 post-event imagery accessible, CPRM report available

description: Most critical missing piece for next gate closure
example: Independent anotated high-resolution imagery; field observation; formal access to municipal GIS layers

description: Can operational ground truth be declared now?

example: Acquire formal access to Defesa Civil spatial data; identify independent annotation source; plan field observation campaign

description: Overall methodological risk of current state
What can be claimed based on current evidence
example: Event occurred on documented date; affected areas are registered by Defesa Civil; Sentinel-2 shows radiometric change; no operational ground truth can be declared

description: What cannot be claimed under any circumstances
example: Operational ground truth; flood detection by algorithm; flood prediction; supervised training labels; ground reference sufficiency without triangulation

Region priority: HIGH. Sentinel data accessibility is excellent. Main blocker: formal access to municipal spatial data and independent validation source. DINO structural review possible but only for methodological reference, never as ground truth.
